title: 📘 قاعدة المستقبل: (be) going to (الوحدة 13)

topics.name: 1. الاستخدام
topics.rule: نستخدم 'going to' للتحدث عن خطط ونوايا مستقبلية، أو توقعات بناءً على دليل.
examples: I am going to travel next week. (خطة)
Look at those clouds! It is going to rain. (توقع)

topics.name: 2. التشكيل (Form)
topics.rule: الفاعل + am/is/are + going to + الفعل المصدر

form.positive: I am going to eat. / She is going to study. / They are going to play.
form.negative: I am not going to be late. / He isn't going to come.
form.question: Are you going to join us? / Is she going to cook?

topics.name: 3. ملاحظات مهمة
topics.rule: لا نستخدم 'going to' مع أفعال الحركة (go, come) كثيراً؛ نفضل المضارع المستمر.
tips: ✅ going to + مكان = الذهاب إلى مكان (I am going to school).
✅ going to + فعل = سأفعل شيئاً (I am going to study).
❌ I am going to go to the cinema → الأفضل I am going to the cinema.

common_mistakes: ❌ She is going to eats. → ✅ She is going to eat.
❌ They are go to play. → ✅ They are going to play.
❌ I am going to be sick? (سؤال) → ✅ Am I going to be sick?
